case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JOHNNY HIRAIN GOMEZ AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-16-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT JOHNNY HIRIAN GOMEZ AGUILAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ AGUILAR, JOHNNY HIRAIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHNNY HIRAIN GOMEZ AGUILAR IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50 REMARKS: PER CURRENT RESIDENT THE DEFENDANT NO LONGER LIVES AT LISTED ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ AGUILAR, JOHNNY HIRAIN
